description: Intermittent NCCL timeout on rank 2 during distributed training barrier

ground_truth.root_cause: NCCL collective allreduce barrier timed out on rank 2 after 1800s. This is an intermittent failure (3/20 runs) likely due to GPU thermal throttling or NVLink bandwidth saturation on the affected node.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Instrument per-rank timing to identify the slow rank. Add NCCL_DEBUG=INFO and check for link errors. Consider pinning tests to specific GPU nodes or adding retry logic for flaky distributed barriers.
